column2: Combined maximum service time: 8 combined terms or 20 years
While in office, an official may not run for election to any other office, including re-election planning for another office while still serving
Must wait at least 2 years before being elected to another office
Cannot be appointed or run in a special election to fill a vacancy if doing so would violate the wait period

If elected in a special election to fill a vacancy and the term is more than halfway over, it does not count toward the term limit, no wait is needed for re-election, and it does not count toward maximum service time
If appointed and less than 2 years remain in a Senate term, it does not count toward Senate term limits, but does count toward total service time if more than 1 year remains
